TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_gong_Hkawan, title = gong_Hkawan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/gong_Hkawan} }

S.FORM: ki'an quilh balay ga cyux maki gong Hkawan. mqyanux na sraral sraral ga pitu ngnsal qalang myan,mwah pcbaq muya pinbahuw lga wal maki Sqoyaw qalang qasa la.
ki'an quilh balay ga cyux maki gong Hkawan. mqyanux na sraral sraral ga pitu ngnsal qalang myan,mwah pcbaq muya pinbahuw lga wal maki Sqoyaw qalang qasa la.
S.PHON: kiʔan quilħ βalaj ɣa ʦ~ʨjux maki ɣoŋ ħkawan. mqjanux na s~ɕraral s~ɕraral ɣa pitu ŋns~ɕal qalaŋ mjan,mwaħ pʦ~ʨβaq muja pinβaħuw lɣa wal maki s~ɕqojaw qalaŋ qas~ɕa la.
